channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti on the street sign, 14th March
item.description:
Some graffiti on the back of the street sign.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colnbrook Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 24" x 10", 5" deep, where offside tyre of vehicle would be on lane., 14th March
item.description:
Pothole has been here for a few months, was previously reported (2901501) but nothing was done. Pothole is increasing insize, large pieces of tarmac across the road that could get thrown up into path of other ventricles or pedestrians. The hole is right by where the offside wheel of a vehicle would drive across which is making deterioration faster and likely to cause vehicle damage.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Avery Hill Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti, 14th March
item.description:
Please remove it’s on the whole road on a number of buildings.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Willesden lane by bus stop, 14th March
item.description:
Bin full of disposable nappies

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Street bin needs emptying

item.title: Bollard damaged, 14th March
item.description:
Illuminated bollard on pedestrian island knocked over, still attached to island on one edge of cover.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Poverest Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture, carpet & toys flytipped, 14th March
item.description:
Bexley rd- outside Acorn estate agents. Corner of Limewood. Flytipping of Furniture carpets, toys & household waste. Someone is clearing a property here & dumping their belongings on our highstreet & surrounding roads.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bexley Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black recycling bin left along public walkway, 14th March
item.description:
Black recycling bin left along public walkway and is too big to get rid of

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2a, Broadcroft Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked on corner over double yellow lines and at a busy traffic light zone, 14th March
item.description:
Blocks visibility of moving traffic and pedestrians

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Harefield Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 foot pothoke, 14th March
item.description:
Pothole on roundabout

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ryecroft Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple purple sacks, gas cannisters, mattress and chair, 14th March
item.description:
I’m a street friend and today I collected 16 purple bags of litter. Including some fly tipped rubbish, 9 gas cannisters, an old mattress and a chair. All from the area opposite 13 new street hill.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Street Hill, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in park, 14th March
item.description:
About two weeks ago I noticed someone doing refurbishment of shed or garage on this location. They throw away lots of items behind the fence. I thought they will collect it after but all of this rubbish is still there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nelson Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large box now added to dumped furniture outside 195 Petts Wood Road, 14th March
item.description:
Please can this fly tipped furniture plus newly added box be removed as soon as possible before more household rubbish is left here on Bluston Parade. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 196, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole and Groves in the Road, 14th March
item.description:
By the width restrictions, deep pothole and groves in gthe road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Haselbury Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped black bag on top of litter bins next to bus stop, 14th March
item.description:
Flytipped black bag on top of litter bins next to bus stop
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 405, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole, 14th March
item.description:
A very deep pothole which WILL cause damage to vehicles. Gettin deeper
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Street, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pallet sticks and a chair, 14th March
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple items on pavement, 14th March
item.description:
There are multiple items on the pavement blocking access including a fridge, a huge industrial bin and a sofa. This could be from the business in this location, or possibly a resident, but it is not acceptable and needs to be remedied. It also looks to be attracting rats.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 198, Halfway Street, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Soil dumped, 14th March
item.description:
Soil dumped up to a year ago, attracts further litter and fly tipping. It's behind 10/12 Frant Close on Blenheim Green

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Build up of leaves and detritus, 14th March
item.description:
Build up.of leaves and detritus, blocks path, makes it unsafe and unsightly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frant Close, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 14th March
item.description:
In the woods

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glassmill Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
